# Explore the data structure
import torch
import pandas as pd
import os

data_dir = '/data'

# Load CSV data
csv_train = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(data_dir, 'train.csv'))
print('CSV Train shape:', csv_train.shape)
print('CSV Train head:')
print(csv_train.head())

# Load 3D data
train_3d = torch.load(os.path.join(data_dir, 'train_3d.pt'))
print('\n3D Train length:', len(train_3d))
print('Sample 3D data point:')
print(train_3d[0])

# Check validation data
val_3d = torch.load(os.path.join(data_dir, 'val_3d.pt'))
print('\n3D Val length:', len(val_3d))
print('Sample val data point:')
print(val_3d[0])
